description: Vault tools — search wiki entries by query/archetype/domain, fetch full entry by id or path. Surfaces the OS's structured memory to Claude as typed tools.

tools.name: search_wiki
tools.summary: Search wiki entries by free-text query, optionally filtered by archetype + domain. Returns top-N hits with id, title, archetype, domain, path, snippet, score.

tools.name: get_entry
tools.summary: Fetch a full wiki entry by id (preferred) or path. Returns frontmatter + body + computed metadata.

tools.name: list_archetypes
tools.summary: List all wiki archetypes present in the index with entry counts. Useful when the caller wants to know what kinds of entries exist.
